metadata.title: Marius Schäffer — Software Engineer Focused on AI
metadata.description: Marius Schäffer (MX Digital): enterprise LLM agent systems, tool integration & RAG, context engineering. AI development and process automation for businesses.

about.title: Profile
about.metaDescription: Marius Schäffer, software engineer focused on AI. Experience, education and tech stack.
about.intro1: I'm Marius Schäffer, a software engineer focused on artificial intelligence. Computers and everything around them have fascinated me since childhood.
about.intro2: My focus is LLM agent systems for enterprise use: tool integration & RAG, context engineering and the automation of entire business processes, from architecture to production operations.
about.intro3: Beyond the tech, I explore individual psychology and coaching. At the end of the day, software is a tool that helps people get their work done and reach their goals.

chat.title: Chat
chat.metaDescription: AI assistant of Marius Schäffer: ask about projects, experience and tech stack directly in the chat.
chat.welcomeHint: Ask me anything about Marius, his projects or his tech stack.
chat.gateHint: Confirm you're not a bot — then the chat starts.
chat.consentHint: Your messages and your IP address are processed to answer you. See the <link>privacy policy</link> for details.
chat.consentAccept: I have read and accept the privacy policy
chat.consentError: That didn't work. Please try again.
chat.errorRateLimit: That was a bit too many messages. Please try again later.
